images.alt: NOCTURNE 01 — THE NIGHT BEGINS WITH SILENCE. Monochrome night photography exploring stillness, darkness, and urban quiet.
NOCTURNE 02 — LIGHT SURVIVES BRIEFLY. Dark monochrome night photograph capturing fleeting illumination within shadow.
NOCTURNE 03 — SHAPES LOSE THEIR NAMES. Fine art night photography where form dissolves into darkness.
NOCTURNE 04 — SHADOW TAKES THE WALL. High-contrast monochrome night image emphasizing shadow structure and surface tension.
NOCTURNE 05 — THE ARROW POINTS INWARD. Monochrome nocturne photograph expressing inward direction and contemplative night atmosphere.
NOCTURNE 06 — NOTHING RETURNS. Dark monochrome night photography exploring absence, silence, and emotional depth.
